message:
feat: activate Jaeger Tracing monitoring card in marketplace (fixes #9) (#128)

Console-side implementation landed in kubestellar/console#9878 (@Pranjal6955).
Flipping preset from help-wanted placeholder to available.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,5 @@
   "format": "kc-card-preset-v1",
   "card_type": "jaeger_status",
   "title": "Jaeger Tracing",
-  "config": {},
-  "_placeholder": true,
-  "_help_wanted": "This card preset is a placeholder. See the associated GitHub issue for implementation instructions."
+  "config": {}
 }

@@ -121,7 +121,7 @@
     {
       "id": "midnight-blue",

       "author": "community",
       "version": "1.0.0",
